info.title: twilio — mocker seed-data schema
info.description: Schema for the seed data openfn-mocker needs to impersonate twilio. Derived from the adaptor's OpenAPI spec. A seed dump is { collection: { id: record } }; each record validates against its resource schema below.

SeedData.description: Full seed dump loaded by mocker: one property per collection.

medias.description: Records keyed by id for the medias collection.

messages.description: Records keyed by id for the messages collection.

To.description: The recipient's phone number in E.164 format (or channel address, e.g. whatsapp:+15552229999).

From.description: A Twilio phone number, alphanumeric sender ID, or short code the message is sent from. Required unless MessagingServiceSid is used.

MessagingServiceSid.description: The SID of the Messaging Service to send through, used instead of From.

Body.description: The text content of the message. Up to 1600 characters.

MediaUrl.description: URLs of media to include in an MMS message.

StatusCallback.description: A URL Twilio will POST delivery status updates to.

Body.description: The new message body. An empty string redacts the message body of a sent message.

Status.description: Set to canceled to cancel a scheduled message that has not yet been sent.

sid.description: The unique string identifying the Message resource.

account_sid.description: The SID of the Account that sent the message.

messaging_service_sid.description: The SID of the Messaging Service used, if any.

body.description: The text content of the message.

num_segments.description: The number of segments that make up the complete message.

num_media.description: The number of media files associated with the message.

from.description: The sender's phone number, alphanumeric sender ID, short code, or channel address.

to.description: The recipient's phone number or channel address.

date_created.description: RFC 2822 timestamp (GMT) of when the resource was created.

date_updated.description: RFC 2822 timestamp (GMT) of when the resource was last updated.

date_sent.description: RFC 2822 timestamp (GMT) of when the message was sent.

error_code.description: The error code if the message status is failed or undelivered.

error_message.description: The description of the error_code, if any.

price.description: The amount billed for the message in the currency specified by price_unit.

price_unit.description: The currency the price is measured in (ISO 4217).

api_version.description: The API version used to process the message.

uri.description: The URI of the resource relative to https://api.twilio.com.

subresource_uris.description: A map of related subresources (e.g. media, feedback).

MessageList.description: A paged list of Message resources.

Media.description: A Twilio Media resource attached to a Message.

sid.description: The unique string identifying the Media resource.

account_sid.description: The SID of the Account associated with this Media resource.

parent_sid.description: The SID of the Message that this Media resource belongs to.

content_type.description: The default MIME type of the media, e.g. image/jpeg.

date_created.description: RFC 2822 timestamp (GMT) when the resource was created.

date_updated.description: RFC 2822 timestamp (GMT) when the resource was last updated.

uri.description: The URI of the resource relative to https://api.twilio.com.

MediaList.description: A paged list of Media resources.
